patent_context.patent_title: Automated nutrient dispensing system for hydroponic cultivation
patent_context.claim_description: An automated nutrient dispensing system comprising a pH sensor, an EC sensor, a programmable dispensing controller, and a nutrient reservoir with calibrated dosing pumps

product.product_description: A specialised nutrient dispensing module designed for integration with hydroponic systems. Features pH and EC sensors, dosing controller, and calibrated pumps.
product.staple_reasoning: The module is purpose-built for hydroponic nutrient dispensing with no substantial non-infringing use outside the patented system

supplier_conduct.reason_to_believe_details: Supplier is a former distribution partner who was briefed on the patent during the partnership. Partnership terminated due to IP dispute.
supplier_conduct.instructions_details: Product manual describes integration with the patented system by name and includes step-by-step setup matching the patented method
supplier_conduct.inducement_details: Marketing materials promote the module as a 'drop-in replacement' for the patented system's dispensing unit

claims.claim_text: An automated nutrient dispensing system comprising a pH sensor; an EC sensor; a programmable dispensing controller; and a nutrient reservoir with calibrated dosing pumps
claim_elements: nutrient reservoir with calibrated dosing pumps
claims.accused_product_description: The HydroNutrient Pro module includes integrated pH and EC sensors, a microcontroller-based programmable dispensing unit, and connects to a nutrient reservoir via calibrated peristaltic dosing pumps.

element_mapping_facts.elem_1: pH sensor present and integrated — matched
element_mapping_facts.elem_2: EC sensor present and integrated — matched
element_mapping_facts.elem_3: Microcontroller-based programmable dispensing unit — satisfies this element
element_mapping_facts.elem_4: Calibrated peristaltic dosing pumps connected to reservoir — present

evidence.evidence_notes: Former partner with detailed knowledge; marketing materials and product manual available; expert report commissioned
